module-2-notes-organizer-project.label: Project: Notes Organizer
module-2-notes-organizer-project.summary: Turn a messy download folder into a clean school workspace with backups.

ci-organizer-create-folders.title: Create the semester folders
ci-organizer-create-folders.hint: Create the destination folders before moving files.

help.concept: Use the terminal to change the workspace, then check the result with `ls`.
help.hint_1: Create the destination folders before moving files.
help.hint_2: Submit when the required path exists and any unwanted path is gone.

ci-organizer-move-files.title: Sort the downloaded files
ci-organizer-move-files.prompt: Move `notes.txt`, `homework.txt`, and `project.sh` from `downloads` into their matching semester folders.
ci-organizer-move-files.hint: Create destinations first, then use `mv` for each file.

help.concept: Use the terminal to change the workspace, then check the result with `ls`.
help.hint_1: Create destinations first, then use `mv` for each file.
help.hint_2: Submit when the required path exists and any unwanted path is gone.

ci-organizer-final.title: Back up notes and clear old clutter
ci-organizer-final.hint: This final task may need `mkdir -p`, `mv`, `cp`, and `rm`.

help.concept: Use the terminal to change the workspace, then check the result with `ls`.
help.hint_1: This final task may need `mkdir -p`, `mv`, `cp`, and `rm`.
help.hint_2: Submit when the required path exists and any unwanted path is gone.

help.concept: Build destination folders before moving files.

try-organizer-move-card.title: Move one note card
try-organizer-move-card.hint: Create the destination folder if needed, then use `mv`.

help.concept: A backup is a copy, so the original should remain.
help.hint_2: Run the command in the terminal, check the response, then submit.

organizer-goal.title: Sort by purpose
organizer-goal.bodyMarkdown: A messy folder is easier to fix when each destination has a clear job: notes, assignments, scripts, and backups.

organizer-safe-plan.title: Move each file once
organizer-safe-plan.bodyMarkdown: Before moving, list the inbox and read the filenames. Then move each file to the folder where someone would expect to find it.

organizer-final-check.title: Back up what matters, remove what does not
organizer-final-check.bodyMarkdown: A good cleanup keeps useful work, backs up important notes, and removes temporary clutter.
